content.zh: ubuntu-releases 和 ubuntu 仓库同步出了问题，部分文件校验不通过。在修好之前装系统和升级先别用这个源。
content.en: ubuntu-releases and ubuntu repos have sync issues — some files failed checksum. Avoid using them for installs or upgrades until further notice.

content.zh: 上游 PyPI 最近在做大规模索引重建，我们的镜像跟不太上，pip install 可能会比较慢或者拉到旧版本。急用的话先切回官方源。
content.en: Upstream PyPI is doing a large index rebuild, so our mirror is falling behind. pip install may be slow or pull older versions. Switch to the official source if urgent.
